Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 80
- main street road, 2-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: alley entrance mid-block; parking: parallel street parking both sides
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories, red brick, cast iron storefront columns, flat parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story, brick, plate glass storefront, flat with low parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories, brick, stone trim cornice, flat roof, at sidewalk setback
- utilities: overhead power and telephone lines, wooden utility poles every 50 feet
- landscape: concrete sidewalks, brick pavers at crosswalks, small planted tree pits
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2015
Smartphone era fully arrived. A 2015 main street mid-revival — the video store replaced by a phone repair shop, third-wave coffee and a vape shop, smartphones in every hand.

PERIOD DETAILS
- the same diner, retro-styled, with 'COFFEE $2.25' chalked on a menu board
- boutique with a reclaimed-wood facade and minimalist lettering
- third-wave coffee shop with a minimalist logo and Edison bulbs visible inside
Typography: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 14 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a barista delivering drinks to an outdoor table
- a man in a henley checking a fitness band
Clothing: men in slim-fit plaid shirts, henley shirts; women in yoga pants and leggings, ankle boots. Fashion palette: coral, mint green, navy. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 6 period vehicles, all different:
- 2013-2019 Ford Fusion — Aston-Martin-style grille, sleek — gray
- 2009-2018 Ram 1500 — crosshair grille, refined — silver
- 2015-2020 Ford Edge — mid-size crossover, bold grille — dark red
- 2013-2018 Hyundai Santa Fe — fluidic sculpture styling — blue
- 2012-2015 Honda Civic — compact, angular — black
- 2013-2018 Toyota RAV4 — angular compact crossover — white
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 2015.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines common, undergrounding in new developments, fiber optic lines on poles

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: mature tree, full canopy
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: established tree, modest canopy

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — DSLR or smartphone camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: clean, minimal noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2015-2020 Ford Edge — mid-size crossover, bold grille
2013-2018 Hyundai Santa Fe — fluidic sculpture styling
